title: Umapyoi Extra Cards
description: Added more support cards for Umapyoi
body:
Umapyoi Extra Cards
---
💬 Introduction
---
Are you still worried that the number of support cards in Umapyoi is too small and the choices are too few?

This mod can add more support card options to the training of your beloved Umamusume!

❓ What does it add? 
---
Currently added R and SR support cards for existing characters in the mod, as well as several SSR support cards! 

More support cards will be added in the future!

🐞 How to report problems and suggestions？ 
---
To submit issues and suggestions, please use the [issue submission page](https://github.com/KLXLjun/umapyoi_extra_cards/issues) in Github

❗ Warning! 
---
The current support cards added are not balanced enough and are only for testing.

Please remember to back up the game save when using it to prevent errors or crashes in the game or due to updated versions.
